projectDescription: Proof-of-concept exploit for unauthenticated remote code execution in SPIP before 4.2.1 via PHP object injection.
keyFeatures: Interactive command shell with CSRF token handling
PHP object injection via serialized payload
Command output extraction from reflected response
publicApiSurface: get_csrf_token(url) - Fetch anti-CSRF token from password reset form
run_command(url, csrf_token, command) - Execute command via serialized payload
main() - CLI entry point with argparse
